scenes.narration: Bhai sun, ye Service Discovery: Consul vs Kubernetes ki ek mistake teri ₹40-60LPA ki Atlassian offer cancel kara dega.
Without understanding Service Discovery: Consul vs Kubernetes, systems fail at scale. Here's why it matters.
Think of Service Discovery: Consul vs Kubernetes like a traffic cop at a busy intersection — directing flow efficiently.
The core mechanism of Service Discovery: Consul vs Kubernetes: it distributes work, manages state, and handles failures gracefully.
Key properties of Service Discovery: Consul vs Kubernetes: fault tolerance, horizontal scalability, and low latency.
Real-world example: companies like Netflix and Uber use Service Discovery: Consul vs Kubernetes to serve millions of users daily.
Quick recap: Service Discovery: Consul vs Kubernetes solves scale. Remember: distribute, monitor, and failover. That's the pattern.
